BUU-SUPER_FORM.title: Super Form
BUU-MAJIN_BURST.title: Majin Burst
BUU-FULL_ABSORPTION.title: Full Absorption
BUU-EVIL_EMERGES.title: Evil Emerges
BUU-EVIL_EMERGES.description: Enter [gold]Majin[/gold] stance. Deal and receive double damage.
BUU-GOOD_RIDDANCE.title: Good Riddance
BUU-SUPER_AURA.title: Super Aura
BUU-SUPER_AURA.description: Enter [gold]Super[/gold] stance. Deal triple damage. Exit at end of turn.
BUU-KI_STRIKE.title: Ki Strike
BUU-KI_BARRIER.title: Ki Barrier
BUU-KI_WELL.title: Ki Well
BUU-KI_WELL.description: At the start of each turn, gain {KiWellPower:diff()} [pink]Ki[/pink].
BUU-MAJIN_FURY.title: Majin Fury
BUU-MAJIN_FURY.description: Whenever you enter [gold]Majin[/gold] stance, gain 2 [pink]Ki[/pink] per stack.
BUU-SUPER_SPIRIT.title: Super Spirit
BUU-SUPER_SPIRIT.description: Whenever you enter [gold]Super[/gold] stance, gain 2 [pink]Ki[/pink] per stack.
BUU-REGENERATIVE_FORM.title: Regenerative Form
BUU-CANDY_CHORUS.title: Candy Chorus
BUU-CANDY_CHORUS.description: At the start of each turn, draw {CandyChorusPower:diff()} card(s).
BUU-KI_SURGE.title: Ki Surge
BUU-KI_SURGE.description: At the start of each turn, gain 1 [pink]Ki[/pink] and draw {KiSurgePower:diff()} card(s).
BUU-BUU_STUDY.title: Buu Study
BUU-BUU_STUDY.description: At the end of your turn, gain {BuuRitualPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
BUU-BLOCK_TO_KI.title: Block to Ki
BUU-BUU_FORESIGHT.title: Buu Foresight
BUU-BUU_FORESIGHT.description: At the start of each turn, draw {BuuForesightPower:diff()} additional card(s).
BUU-RETAINED_KI.title: Retained Ki
BUU-RETAINED_KI.description: Retained cards cost {RetainedKiPower:diff()} less this combat.
BUU-MARK.title: Mark
BUU-MARK.description: At the start of each turn, apply {MarkPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to a random enemy.
BUU-MAJIN_DRAW.title: Majin Draw
BUU-MAJIN_DRAW.description: Whenever you enter [gold]Majin[/gold] stance, draw 2 cards per stack.
BUU-STANCE_GUARD.title: Stance Guard
BUU-STANCE_GUARD.description: Whenever you change stance, gain 4 [gold]Block[/gold] per stack.
BUU-CALM_BLOCK.title: Calm Block
BUU-CALM_AURA.title: Calm Aura
BUU-CALM_AURA.description: At the end of your turn, if in [gold]Regular[/gold] stance, gain 3 [gold]Block[/gold] per stack.
BUU-PINK_WAVE.title: Pink Wave
BUU-PINK_WAVE.description: At the end of your turn, deal 3 damage to a random enemy per stack.
BUU-STANCE_DUALITY.title: Stance Duality
BUU-STANCE_DUALITY.description: Whenever you change stance, gain 2 [gold]Block[/gold] and 2 [pink]Ki[/pink] per stack.
BUU-BUU_FASTING.title: Buu Fasting
BUU-BUU_FASTING.description: At the start of your turn, gain {BuuFastingPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {BuuFastingPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Lose 1 [gold]Energy[/gold].
BUU-REGULAR_FORM.title: Regular Form
BUU-REGULAR_FORM.description: Whenever you enter [gold]Regular[/gold] stance, gain 4 [gold]Block[/gold] per stack.
BUU-RAGE.title: Rage
BUU-RAGE.description: Whenever you receive attack damage, gain {RagePower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
BUU-OMEGA.title: Omega
BUU-OMEGA.description: At the end of your turn, deal {OmegaPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
BUU-BLASPHEMER.title: Blasphemer
BUU-BLASPHEMER.description: Apply {BlasphemerPower:diff()} stack(s). At the start of each turn, deal {BlasphemerDamage:diff()} damage to a random enemy per stack of this power.
BUU-BUU_DEVA.title: Buu Deva
BUU-BUU_DEVA.description: At the start of each turn, gain {BuuDevaPower:diff()} [gold]Energy[/gold].
BUU-MASTER_REALITY.title: Master Reality
BUU-MASTER_REALITY.description: At the end of your turn, gain 2 [pink]Ki[/pink] per stack.
